case_title: DALE GATES VS. JOHNSON & JOHNSON SERVICES, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: VERIFIED APPLICATION OF ROBERT J. PATTERSON TO APPEAR COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR THE PLAINTIFF DAVID BOATRIGHT IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF REFILING THE MOTION. AFTER REVIEWING THE LETTER OF APRIL 8, 2011 THAT WAS DROPPED OFF IN THE DEPARTMENT'S OUTBOX, THE COURT FINDS THAT IT IS NOT A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATIVE OF SUFFICIENT NOTICE UNDER C C P 1005 (B). THE LETTER IS MERELY AN AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES OF THE CONTINUATION OF THE HEARING DATE AND DOES NOT INDICATE THAT ALL PARTIES HAVE RECEIVED PROPER NOTICE FOR THE HEARING DATE OR WERE AGREEING TO THE RELIEF. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RYAN THOMPSON OF THE WATTS GUERRA CRAFT LLP, TEL. NO. (210) 448-0500 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. THE LAW FIRM OF WATTS GUERRA CRAFT LLP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS Counsel for The Plaintiff DALE GATES' is Granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/HK

VERIFIED APPLICATION OF ROBERT J. PATTERSON TO APPEAR COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR THE PLAINTIFF DAVID BOATRIGHT IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF REFILING THE MOTION. AFTER REVIEWING THE LETTER OF APRIL 8, 2011 THAT WAS DROPPED OFF IN THE DEPARTMENT'S OUTBOX, THE COURT FINDS THAT IT IS NOT A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATIVE OF SUFFICIENT NOTICE UNDER C C P 1005 (B). THE LETTER IS MERELY AN AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES OF THE CONTINUATION OF THE HEARING DATE AND DOES NOT INDICATE THAT ALL PARTIES HAVE RECEIVED PROPER NOTICE FOR THE HEARING DATE OR WERE AGREEING TO THE RELIEF.
